title: MrBeast's $500M Amazon Deal Triggers Global Content Wars
subtitle: Creator economy shifts as tech giants battle for influence supremacy

ripples.headline: YouTube panic-launches $2B creator retention fund as top talents defect to Amazon Prime
Netflix stock plummets 15% as investors fear Amazon's creator acquisition spree
Feastables chocolate bars become exclusive Amazon Fresh product, disrupting retail partnerships
Small video production companies surge 300% as creators demand Hollywood-level content
Global internet bandwidth costs spike as streaming platforms compete with premium content
Remote villages in Bangladesh get fiber internet upgrades to access exclusive Prime content
Local burrito shop raises prices $2 after delivery driver binge-watches MrBeast instead of working

symphony_arc.opening: A digital titan makes a half-billion dollar bet on the future of entertainment
symphony_arc.development: Traditional platforms scramble as the creator economy reshapes global media consumption
symphony_arc.climax: Infrastructure strains under the weight of premium content wars while markets convulse
symphony_arc.resolution: The world adapts to a new entertainment paradigm, one overpriced burrito at a time
